name: Delete all Valhalla-imported rules from the Sekoia Rules Catalog
description: Enumerates the Sekoia Rules Catalog and deletes every rule whose configured top-level field equals a configured value. Intended default: `match_field=created_by`, `match_value=<Sekoia API key UUID>` — every rule the sync trigger's API key creates carries that UUID in `created_by`, so filtering on it uniquely identifies our imports. Leave `match_value` empty on first run and the trigger will log the tenant's actual `created_by` UUIDs so you can pick the right one. Never touches user-created rules or Sekoia's verified catalog. Defaults to dry-run — set `confirm=true` for deletions to actually run.

confirm.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.description: Must be true for rules to actually be deleted. When false, the trigger emits a report of what WOULD be deleted and makes no DELETE calls.

match_field.title: Field to filter on
match_field.description: Top-level rule field to match against. Default `created_by` (the UUID of the API key that created the rule). Advanced users can point this at any other field returned by the Rules Catalog list endpoint (`community_uuid`, `alert_type`, ...).

match_value.title: Value the field must equal
match_value.description: Only rules whose `match_field` equals this value are deleted. When empty, the trigger runs in diagnostic mode and logs the top values observed in the tenant.

frequency.title: Re-run frequency in seconds
frequency.description: How often to re-check the catalog for anything left to delete. Once the tenant is clean this is a no-op. Default 24h.
